name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one rack 4 or 5 inches from the bottom of the oven. Preheat to 450°F.
2. Line a 9-inch pie pan with pastry.
3. Scrub potatoes in cold water, place in a 3-quart saucepan, cover pan, and cook until soft. Drain potatoes, remove skins while hot, and rub them through a food mill or sieve to remove fibers. Cool slightly.
4. Beat butter into the cooled potato mixture. Add egg yolks and next four ingredients; beat until smooth and creamy. Stir in last three ingredients.
5. Pour mixture into pan. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 300°F, bake 25-30 minutes more.
6. Lift pie from oven and spread with meringue (2 beaten egg whites combined with 3 tablespoons sugar). Ensure the meringue touches the crust all around and is smooth or swirled over top.
7. Return to oven for 20 minutes to brown the meringue. Remove and cool 2-3 hours before cutting.
